[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Round-cap resilience (prevent per-turn blowouts) + sentiment_importer/dao_protocol doc cleanup
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/630
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/275
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/631

  Details:
  Diagnosed why Sophia still hit the per-turn tool-round cap despite AUTO_ADVANCE=true: AUTO_ADVANCE removes the between-PR human gate; the firing cap is CHAT_MAX_TOOL_ROUNDS=30 (per-turn, never raised). Root-caused the 2026-06-28 POST_REPACKAGING blowout (one turn merged PR4 + auto-advanced into PR5's live cross-repo Code.gs audit). Built three prevention mechanisms: (#1) §5d Pre-flight Completeness authoring gate + tracked ROUND_CAP_RESILIENCE_PLAN.md [agentic_ai_context#630]; (#2 soft-budget + #3 one-PR-boundary) graceful convergence backstop in app/turn_convergence.py + main.py with 17 unit tests [truesight_autopilot#275, open — own-repo gate]. Also disassociated sentiment_importer from dao_protocol across current-state context docs [agentic_ai_context#631] and kept the roadmap resume tracker current [agentic_ai_context#632].
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
